title: Ennavale Ennai Maranthathu Yeno Lyrics Dhilip Varman Album
stanzas:
ahaa
lend me your ears to this,
yeah, saran z with the beat,
dhilip varma, psycho mantra
this is saint,
now let the saint step up and testify,
this is a story of a girl
who is extra fly

who made me cry
within my eye,
who i still love
beyond the day i die,
i remember sitting in the park
looking at your smile,
glowing up dark,
thinking of the mile
thanking lady luck,
never wanna let your hands go,
juz wanna let you know,
you are the reason i flow,
girl, sitting next to you face to face,
reminiscing how our
love grew base to base,

all those ups and downs
and happy days,
how i am blessed by above
to be touched by your grace,
every left has a right;
every girl has a knight,
and it’s you that i think
about every day and night,
time passes by
but through my rhyme,
u and i will live
more than a lifetime.

ennavale ennai maranthathu yeno,
enni vanthen unnai ninaivugal thaan,
ennai sithaithaval, pinbu anaithaval,
indru vilagi sellum enthan nimmathi nee (2)

adi kalaiyile
un pugai padam parthu,
vaelaiki poga thonala paapu,
keladi intha yaasagan paathu,
ullathille ennai poottu.

uppangkatre meendum
en mel veesu en mel veesu,
kathal penne ennidam
kadhal pesu kadhal pesu.

netriyil naan vaithen
kunguma pottu, kunguma pottu,
sol penne yen chendrai
ennai vittu!!,  ennai vittu!!

un pol penn yaar enna sollu,
ithayathai nee vanthu kelu,
kaathirukke neram illai
vanthu seru,
kolluthadi ninaivugal!!

ennavale ennai maranthathu yeno,
enni vanthen unnai ninaivugal thaan,
ennai sithaithaval, pinbu anaithaval,
indru vilagi sellum enthan nimmathi nee (2)

i’m like a puzzle girl,
with you missing a part,
how am i to lead a life,
when i’m missing my heart,

every blink of my eye
till my life is true,
trust me when i say that
i truly miss you,
oh yeah.

penne nam kadhal
kai koodum neram vandhal,
vizhiyodu serum
en parvai nee than yendral,
naane yendral.
manam vaanam sellum.
sendra pinnal
mazhai charal thoovum.

yen intha matram
enthan nenjil,oh yeah
etho or maayam unthan kannil

manam thedum unnai.
indru thanthen ennai
neengathennai,
illai illai

ennavale ennai maranthathu yeno,
enni vanthen unnai ninaivugal thaan,
ennai sithaithaval, pinbu anaithaval,
indru vilagi sellum enthan nimmathi nee (2)

u complete me,
u make me whole.
without you by my side,
my world is so cold.

flowers bloom
on the path we walk,
you can go out sense of go,
every time you talk.

i walk about like i’m in a fits,
my soul is dry;
i wanna feel your lips,
i feel nothing else only pain,
can’t wait for the day
to hold your hands again.
tamilStanzas:
என்னவளே என்னை மறந்தது ஏனோ,
எண்ணி வந்தேன் உன்னை நினைவுகள் தான்,
என்னை சிதைத்தவள், பின்பு அனைத்தவள்,
இன்று விலகி செல்லும் எந்தன் நிம்மதி நீ

அடி  காலையிலே
உன் புகை படம் பார்த்து,
வேலைக்கு போக தோணல பாப்பு ,
கேளடி இந்த யாசகன் பாத்து,
உள்ளதில்லே என்னை பூட்டு .

உப்பங்கற்றே மீண்டும்
என் மேல் வீசு என் மேல் வீசு,
காதல் பெண்ணே என்னிடம்
காதல் பேசு, காதல் பேசு.
நெற்றியில் நான் வைத்தேன்
குங்கும பொட்டு, குங்கும பொட்டு.
சொல் பெண்ணே ஏன் சென்றாய்
என்னை விட்டு!!, என்னை விட்டு!!

உன் போல் பெண்ண
யார் என்ன சொல்லு.
இதயத்தை நீ வந்து கேளு,
காத்திருக்கே நேரம் இல்லை
வந்து சேரு,
கொள்ளுதடி நினைவுகள்!!

என்னவளே என்னை மறந்தது ஏனோ,
எண்ணி வந்தேன் உன்னை நினைவுகள் தான்,
என்னை சிதைத்தவள், பின்பு அனைத்தவள்,
இன்று விலகி செல்லும் எந்தன் நிம்மதி நீ

i’m like a puzzle girl,
with you missing a part,
how am i to lead a life,
when i’m missing my heart,

every blink of my eye
till my life is true,
trust me when i say that
i truly miss you,
oh yeah.

பெண்ணே நம் காதல்
கைகூடும் நேரம் வந்தால்,
விழியோடு சேரும்
என் பார்வை நீ தான் என்றால்
 நானே என்றால்.
மனம் வானம் செல்லும்.
சென்ற பின்னால்
மழை சாரல் தூவும்.

ஏன் இந்த மாற்றம் எந்தன் நெஞ்சில்,
எதோ ஓர் மாயம் உந்தன் கண்ணில்
மனம் தேடும் உன்னை.
இன்று தந்தேன் என்னை
நீங்காதென்னை,
இல்லை இல்லை

என்னவளே என்னை மறந்தது ஏனோ,
எண்ணி வந்தேன் உன்னை நினைவுகள் தான்,
என்னை சிதைத்தவள், பின்பு அனைத்தவள்,
இன்று விலகி செல்லும் எந்தன் நிம்மதி நீ

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, reflecting on memories of a cherished relationship.

Is there a movie associated with this song?

The movie associated with Ennavale Ennai Maranthathu Yeno is currently unknown.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by Dhilip Varman.

When was the song released?

The song was released in 2018.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Ennavale Ennai Maranthathu Yeno, the singer reminisces about a past love that continues to linger in his heart. The song's melancholic tone evokes feelings of nostalgia and longing, making it relatable for anyone who has faced heartbreak. It beautifully captures the essence of cherished memories and the pain of separation. This heartfelt melody serves as a reminder of the profound impact love can have on our lives.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ennavale Ennai Maranthathu Yeno is a heartfelt melody that captures the essence of lost love and nostalgia. With Dhilip Varman's soulful vocals, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet pangs of romance. Dive into the emotional journey of this track that beautifully intertwines love and longing.
stanzaMeanings: Lend me your ears to this story, it's about a girl who stands out.

Who made me cry? I still love her beyond my life. I remember sitting in the park, looking at her smile, feeling lucky, and I never want to let her go. You are the reason I feel alive, reminiscing how our love grew.

Through all the ups and downs, I feel blessed to be touched by your grace. Every girl has a knight, and I think of you day and night. Time passes, but through my words, we will live beyond a lifetime.
Why have you forgotten me? I came to you with my memories. You were my comfort, and now you are everything to me.
Looking at your picture, I don't feel like going out. I see this artist and it pulls me in.
You keep coming back to me, girl, speak of love to me.
I placed a vermilion on your forehead, and you left me!
Who else can I call a girl like you? Come and listen to my heart, there's no time to wait, come and join me, my memories are overwhelming!
Why have you forgotten me? I came to you with my memories. You were my comfort, and now you are everything to me.
I feel incomplete without you, like a puzzle missing a piece. How can I live without my heart?
Every blink of my eye until my life is real, trust me when I say I truly miss you.
When our love comes together, your gaze is all I see, and I am yours.
This feeling is only in my heart, oh yeah, there's some magic in your eyes.
My heart searches for you. Today, you have left me, no, no.
Why have you forgotten me? I came to you with my memories. You were my comfort, and now you are everything to me.
You complete me, you make me whole. Without you, my world feels cold.
Flowers bloom on the path we walk, and every time you speak, I feel a connection.
I walk around like I'm in a daze, my soul feels empty; I want to feel your lips again, all I feel is pain, and I can't wait to hold your hands again.
